composite_description: BEAR cycle with normal conditions -- nothing to do
brief:
Bitcoin remains in established downtrend below its 200-day moving average, with macro cycle positioning in BEAR phase. Fear and Greed at 11 reflects capitulation sentiment. Market structure shows normal conditions: no extreme funding dislocations, no rotation signals at institutional scale, and risk appetite metrics (SOL/BTC at -1.27 z-score) reflecting orderly deleveraging rather than panic liquidation.

The death cross on the 200d MA anchors the bear thesis. Absence of funding extremes and the muted drawdown magnitudes (BTC -4% over 5d, near normal volatility) mean this is managed correction within an established regime, not setup for tactical dislocation trades. No action warranted until cycle structure or funding dynamics shift materially.
